panels.title: 🪙 Token Items
panels.infobox:
Token items grant permanent stat bonuses when equipped.

⚠️ = MISSABLE — tied to specific NPC choices or timed events

entry_Token.name: Findruine Charm
entry_Token.location: Tree stump chest at northernmost point, Hunting Grounds

entry_Token.name: Badger Hide Gloves
entry_Token.location: Chest south of Ketill's Hideout, Neversdale

entry_Token.name: Eagle Charm
entry_Token.location: Chest in Ketill's Hideout, Neversdale

entry_Token.name: Rabbit's Foot
entry_Token.location: Be nice to Ogun's Mum in Houton after reporting his death

entry_Token.name: Falstone Token
entry_Token.location: Chest in poorly lit storeroom by locked door, Kirkwall

entry_Token.name: Silver Torc
entry_Token.location: Chest on Level 3, Forest Tower

entry_Token.name: Badge of the Wind
entry_Token.location: Be nice to Gower at end of Frozen Tombs (he gives you it with Quicksilver Broadsword)

entry_Token.name: Golden Coronet
entry_Token.location: Chest in room at end of northern corridor (west), Burial Chambers — requires Tree Stone

entry_Token.name: Ring of Tara
entry_Token.location: Be completely snarky to Dolyn in all 4 conversations; retrieve from his corpse after he dies in trap
entry_Token.chapter: Ch. VI: Mountain Pass (NOTE: prevents access to 2 other tokens)

entry_Token.name: Silver Horseshoe
entry_Token.location: Chest (dark/trapped path, northern area), Level 2, Mountain Tower

entry_Token.name: Boots of Quickening
entry_Token.location: Win the Talent Contest at The Tup bar, West Dounby

entry_Token.name: Mantle of Ossian
entry_Token.location: Summon rat in Trowle's Pub, Finstown — afraid Viking gives it when rat dismissed

entry_Token.name: Broonie Cloak
entry_Token.location: Chest in Finstown Armory

entry_Token.name: Belt of Oak
entry_Token.location: Chest in northern room of Moon Portal level, MacRath's Dungeon

entry_Token.name: Fae Locket
entry_Token.location: Secret door (east side of room), Skull Portal level, MacRath's Dungeon

entry_Token.name: Four Leaf Clover
entry_Token.location: Stump in northwest corner, Hatcher's Farm

entry_Token.name: Golden Thistle Ring
entry_Token.location: Stump north of building where Hatcher retrieved bow, Hatcher's Farm

entry_Token.name: Firbolg Armbands
entry_Token.location: From frightened Firbolg (Bannock) in Finfolk Caverns

entry_Token.name: Lightning Stone
entry_Token.location: Listen to Olav's entire story in Finfolk Caverns

entry_Token.name: White Book of Rhydderch
entry_Token.location: From Dolyn in Firbolg Mines (requires being nice to him in Ch. VI)

entry_Token.name: Phial of Medb
entry_Token.location: Chest in secret room (secret door, south side of chamber), Carrowmore

entry_Token.name: Cormac's Chalice
entry_Token.location: Chest in final room, Ruins of Tara

entry_Token.name: White Book of Hergest
entry_Token.location: Chest in final room, Ruins of Emain Macha

entry_Token.name: Golden Spyglass
entry_Token.location: Chest at end of main hall, Ruins of Dun Alfiene

entry_Token.name: Amulet of Llyr
entry_Token.location: Chest in secret room, Cairn of Ardagh (requires Upgraded Trap Finder)
